description_long: This is a classic ring-shaped donut with a thick, even coating of chocolate glaze covering the top half. The chocolate glaze is adorned with colorful, elongated sprinkles in yellow, green, orange, and blue, distributed evenly across the surface. The bottom half of the donut is a light golden-brown, indicating a soft, baked or fried dough texture. The donut has a smooth, slightly matte finish, with the glaze appearing slightly glossy and the sprinkles adding a subtle texture. The central hole is round and well-defined, typical of traditional donuts. There is no visible packaging or branding, and the donut appears unwrapped and ready to eat.
description: A ring-shaped donut with chocolate glaze and colorful sprinkles on top, featuring a soft golden-brown dough base.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full chocolate glaze and colorful sprinkles, with the central hole clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick chocolate glaze on the upper half and the plain dough on the lower half.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view showing mostly the plain, golden-brown dough with minimal glaze visible.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying both the chocolate-glazed top with sprinkles and the plain dough underside.
attribute_icing_type: chocolate glaze with a slightly glossy finish
attribute_placement_location: unwrapped, isolated on a plain background
